calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Trust
Off Calendar Aug-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicole Kelly, via Zoom, for and with Nicole Jackson, Petitioner.

The court notes that the deed shows Joan Jackson as the owner and there is no indication of joint tenancy. Ms. Kelly reports of applying for a reverse mortgage and that the company which approved the reverse mortgage would not allow joint tenancy. Ms. Kelly advises that she is attempting to confirm decedent's intent and to avoid foreclosure and probate. Ms. Kelly confirms that Jay Greene, the person named as trust protector within the trust instrument, is the same person who filed the original petition. The court advises Ms. Kelly that it is inclined to confirm that the accounts are trust property but that it cannot grant the request to confirm the real property. The court advises that it is taking the matter under submission and will recognize the foreclosure issue when making its final determination.

The matter is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not Reported.
